title: CommandEnvelope
description: STEPWORK Command Envelope v1 (SYSTEM_SPEC §7.1). All requests entering the Application Services layer MUST be wrapped in this envelope.

commandId.description: Unique identifier for this command invocation

commandType.description: Command type identifier. See SYSTEM_SPEC §7.2 for the canonical list.

schemaVersion.description: Envelope schema version. Fixed to "1" for v1.

id.description: Stable identifier of the actor (user id, agent id, plugin id, or system component name)

source.description: Protocol adapter through which this command entered the system

projectId.description: Target project (optional; some commands operate at workspace scope)

idempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key. Side-effecting commands SHOULD provide one.

payload.description: Command-specific payload. Each commandType defines its own payload schema.

requestedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the command was issued by the caller
